title: Better Fire resistance
description: Modifies the fire resistance effect which allows it to remove the fire overlay when in fire or lava
body:
Better Fire Resistance is a QoL mod that modifies the fire resistance effect which removes that annoying fire overlay, making working with fire and lava easier than before.

**Version 1.2:**
